 As is outlined in home health regulations, as part of the home health agency (HHA) 
Conditions of Participation (CoPs), the clinical record of the patient must contain 
progress and clinical notes. Additionally, in Pub. 100-04, Medicare Claims 
Processing Manual, Chapter 10; “Home Health Agency Billing”, instructions specify 
that for each claim, HHAs are required to report all services provided to the
